A test file that uses strict mode to increment the `arguments` object, which is not allowed.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that attempts to increment the `arguments` object using the unary increment operator (`++`). The `arguments` object is an array-like object accessible within functions that contains the values of the arguments passed to that function. However, in strict mode, which is enabled by the `"use strict"` directive at the beginning of the script, modifying the `arguments` object directly is not allowed and will result in a syntax error. This script demonstrates the enforcement of strict mode rules in JavaScript.
